channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Xander Schauffele is on the mend and motivated as ever at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Two majors made Xander Schauffele believe he was capable of winning them all. Two months out of golf with a rib injury is putting that belief to the test. Schauffele is more than capable of winning the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UConn finishes season at No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll for first time since 2021
item.description: UConn capped its season at No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women’s basketball pol l on Monday, one day after winning its 12th national championship. The Huskies received all 31 votes from a national media panel after Geno Auriemma's team beat South Carolina 82-59 for the title.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect shot from the place on the ice that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McLaren can be beaten, but Verstappen must be perfect: 5 takeaways from F1’s Japanese Grand Prix
item.description: McLaren remains the team to beat in Formula 1, but Max Verstappen’s victorious drive for Red Bull at the Japanese Grand Prix showed only excellence is good enough. Ahead of this week’s Bahrain Grand Prix, here are five takeaways from Suzuka: So, McLaren can be beaten.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Doncic scores 30 points as Lakers dominate NBA-leading Thunder 126-99
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 30 points and the Los Angeles Lakers routed the league-leading Oklahoma City Thunder 126-99 on Sunday. Austin Reaves scored 20 points and LeBron James added 19 points and seven assists for the Lakers, who have won four of five.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mariners' Robles carted off field with shoulder injury after making dazzling catch against Giants
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Seattle Mariners outfielder Victor Robles injured his left shoulder and was carted off the field after making a dazzling catch in the ninth inning of a 5-4 loss to the San Francisco Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After 149 wins over 6 seasons, J'Wan Roberts needs 1 more in last game for Houston's 1st NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — J'Wan Roberts has been at Houston for six seasons and played in 149 wins for the Cougars. Win one more time in his final game Monday night against Florida, and the Cougars will be first-time national champions. “It feels great.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts winless champs LA Galaxy in crucial western showdown
item.description: Real Salt Lake (2-4-0, T-11th place Western Conference) returns home Saturday afternoon when they host reigning MLS Cup Champions LA Galaxy at America First Field. RSL is coming off a road loss on Saturday night and hope to get their season back on track against a struggling LA side.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Vucevic, White, Giddey lead the post-season bound Bulls past the Trail Blazers, 118-113
item.description: Nikola Vucevic and Coby White each had 31 points, Josh Giddey had a triple-double and the post-season bound Chicago Bulls beat the Portland Trail Blazers 118-113 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Chris Collins agrees to multi-year extension with Northwestern
item.description: Northwestern University men's basketball coach Chris Collins has agreed to a multi-year contract extension, making him one of the top coaches in the Big Ten in terms of salary and compensation.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox fall to Twins, 6-1, to drop rubber match of 3-game series after lengthy rain delay on South Side
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Harrison Bader and Byron Buxton hit home runs to back Pablo López's solid start, and the Minnesota Twins beat the Chicago White Sox, 6-1, on Wednesday after rain delayed the start by nearly 3 1/2 hours.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego FC signs Escondido native Milan Iloski from FC Nordsjaelland
item.description: San Diego FC has acquired forward Milan Iloski on loan from its sister club, FC Nordsjaelland (FCN), the club announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker continues home run streak, Cubs top A's for 1st back-to-back wins of 2025 season
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Just one more game, then the Cubs will finally get to play at Wrigley Field. And they're aiming to return home on a three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Vejmelka makes 33 saves as Utah HC stays in playoff hunt
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah is not out of the playoff hunt just yet. Karel Vejmelka made 33 saves in his 18th consecutive start in goal, as the Utah Hockey Club stayed alive in the chase for the NHL playoffs with a hard-fought 3-1 victory over Calgary Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry hits 12 3-pointers, scores 52 as Warriors defeat Grizzlies 134-125
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had 52 points, including 12 3-pointers, as the Golden State Warriors held on for a 134-125 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Carlsbad native earns spot in WSL Challenger Series
item.description: Reid Van Wagoner, a 15-year-old surfer from Carlsbad, has secured a spot in the 2025 Challenger Series after winning a 10-point ride at Soup Bowl in Barbados.
item.dc:creator: Alysse Dodge, Fox 5

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Carson Kelly becomes 1st Cubs player to hit for the cycle in 32 years in 18-3 rout of A's in West Sacramento
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Carson Kelly had come close to hitting for the cycle, yet that elusive triple kept holding him back. He had just two triples over a 10-year big league career before Monday night. That's when Kelly became the first Cubs player in 32 years to hit for the cycle.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, WGN 9
